{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Mead
|class_id=21758
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=In a white skull goblet, the enticing golden-yellow liquor swirls, with each drop's aroma surpassing any aged vintage wine, yet each drop exudes an ominous aura, enough to intoxicate any creature to death... Warning: DrinkingThis wine will plunge you into a state of physical and mental stagnation, leaving you with only a scant few moments of madness for the rest of your life!
|fame=41
|art=49
|fth=73
|civ=35
|tech=45
|ss1=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +3<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500
|ss2=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +40<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +4<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500
|ss3=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +50<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +5<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500
|ss4=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +70<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +7<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500
|ss5=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +90<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +9<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500
|ss7=Per 10 treasure draws, Snail HP +90<br>Per 10 treasure draws, Snail ATK +9<br>Total Treasures drawn: 500/500<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Fungusfarm skill II.png|50px]]Place in Fungus Farm: Grow Wonder Fungus by +15%
|skill2=[[File:Timemachine skill II.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: Generate Time Chests by +15%
}}
